description: Intent-only request: classify long-running multi-team launch coordination as agent-anchored with workflow tools.

conversation.text: Assign an agent to plan and execute our Q3 product launch — coordinate with design, engineering, marketing; keep track of open threads across teams; check in daily; escalate blockers as they arise.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the long-running, multi-session coordination across teams with ongoing state tracking is agent-anchored, with the concrete actions (Slack messages, Notion updates, calendar checks) implemented as workflow tools invoked by the agent.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
